shadcn/ui fork with motion

Components that feel alive

Drop-in shadcn/ui replacement with physics-based motion and modern visual defaults. Same API, better feel.

Get Started GitHub
$ npx peace-ui init

15 animated components

Button

Press feedback with active:scale

Dialog

Spring enter/exit with frosted backdrop

Sheet

iOS-like spring slide from edge

Tabs

Clean transitions with modern radii

Accordion

Smooth height animation

Dropdown Menu

Elevated shadows, rounded corners

Built by peace. Open source under MIT.
